live_observation: Public repo Stry233/SAMA, main commit 5ac7aa4a2e3765958e1b39a7774d72bbe4ee6dcd, pushed 2026-04-13. README links arXiv 2601.20125 and OpenReview, describes ICLR 2026 SAMA for finetuned diffusion language models. Tree exposes attack code, metric code, model configs, dataset preparation, and DLM training code.
blocking_surface: Cross-domain DLM surface; config paths use local train_subset.json/test_subset.json and local target models. Public tree exposes code that can generate metadata, but no committed immutable member/nonmember row manifest, target checkpoint hash, per-row score table, ROC/metric JSON, completed metadata output, or no-training verifier.
decision: Support-only DLM code-public artifact; not current image-diffusion denominator, not C14, not admitted evidence, not second public score/response asset, and not compute release.

live_observation: attack/attacks/sama.py sha 045e912ec65223eb7b6d95f2851bd21b5ce8d059, size 15218. Runtime code can save config.json and full_metadata.json with sample_idx, truncated text, step scores, final_score, and subset metadata when run.
blocking_surface: The schema is runtime-generated and not a committed score/response packet. It still depends on private/local datasets, trained target models, reference models, and CUDA execution.
decision: Useful schema pressure for future row-bound DLM review only; no paper evidence upgrade.

live_observation: attack/run.py sha f94076db39c8a59ee1f7cc141e5f76e903aa545f, size 8721. The runner computes AUC and TPR@FPR thresholds and saves metadata under the selected output directory.
blocking_surface: The repository does not commit the output metadata or result tables. Metrics are generated only after preparing local datasets and trained model paths.
decision: Code-public metric workflow only; not a reusable public score packet.

live_observation: Public repo kaslim/LSA-Probe, main commit 594900158e31b5c5b801d3d534dcc44deb8ade7c, README sha da16eb57996b8c3edc47e474e74f5d7153cd1a8a, size 309. README states status under peer review and says full implementation and reproducibility instructions will be released upon acceptance.
blocking_surface: No implementation, target/split manifest, row-bound scores/responses, ROC/metric JSON, or verifier exposed in the repo. Prior demo-surface checks remain support-only and do not expose a real packet.
decision: Support-only music/audio watch item; not C14 expansion, not current denominator, not admitted evidence, and not compute release.
